# Pattern schema

Each pattern file is intentionally lean.

## YAML
- `title`
- `description`
- `keywords`

## Body
- `Action List`
- `When to use`
- `When not to use`
- `Prefer over`
- `Problem and smells`
- `Expected improvement`
- `Notes`

The YAML is for routing only.
The body is for execution and fit confirmation.
